⚡ CC Support-Floor Bump — 2.1.183 → 2.1.206

Owner decision 2026-07-10: renew the strict pin (floor = latest = latest_known) at the current head. Every dropped version was individually triaged in prior adoption sweeps.

floor 2.1.183 → 2.1.206 drop_after 2.1.205 policy field untouched (window resumes post-override) precedent 2026-06-20 strict pin

Ladder — what the floor now guarantees

2.1.183 ──────────────── old floor (2026-06-20 pin) │ 2.1.198 /dataviz bundled · Notification agent events │ 2.1.203 🔑 worktree shell-command leak CLOSED │ (isolation:"worktree" now truly safe — was known-risk) │ 2.1.204 SessionStart hook streaming in headless │ 2.1.205 --json-schema hard-errors · /doctor full checkup │ 2.1.206 🔑 EnterWorktree external-path confirmation ▼ MCP per-server request_timeout_ms honored 2.1.206 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ NEW FLOOR ✅ (= latest = latest_known) guarantees: leak-free worktree isolation · strict schema errors · per-server MCP timeouts · headless SessionStart streaming

Edit surface — the full cascade

SiteKindChange

Verification

✅ stamp-cc-support.mjs 6 mutations (CLAUDE.md, matrix, README ×2, docs ×2) ✅ cc-version-matrix test 10/10 (pin updated w/ owner-decision note) ✅ test-cc-release-watch.sh 34/34 — fixture+test bumped TOGETHER (.latest coupling) ✅ check-docs-facts OK (floor 2.1.206, 114 skills, 37 agents, 215 hooks) ✅ test:manifests all delivery paths pass ✅ typecheck + hooks build clean KEPT: historical mentions (2.1.183-era behavior notes) — not floor semantics
